prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GT2860RS-5** turbocharger (compatible with the **B5254T5** 2.5L I5 engine) to achieve 320-350whp with supporting mods, utilizing a **3.5" V-band downpipe** (e.g., **Ferrita Performance**) and a **custom 3.5" stainless steel exhaust system** (e.g., **Supersprint** or **Scorpion**) with a **resonated center section** to reduce drone while maintaining aggressive tone

Install a **Plex Tuning Stage 2+ ECU flash** (specifically mapped for the **B5254T5** with **E85 flex-fuel capability**) paired with a **Bosch 0280158002** high-flow fuel pump, **Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors**, and a **Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup** to prevent oil buildup in the intake tract under high boost

Replace the stock **M66C** 6-speed manual transmission with a **Volvo M90** (from the **S60R/V70R**) reinforced with a **Quaife ATB differential**, **South Bend Stage 3 Clutch**, and **PPG lightweight flywheel** (10.5lb) for improved throttle response and durability under increased torque
estetica: Install a **Heico Sportiv HPC Front Lip** (OEM+ style, carbon fiber) paired with a **Volvo OEM S60R rear diffuser** (modified for S40 fitment) and **custom 3M Matte Black wrap** on the roof, mirrors, and lower body cladding for a stealth-aggressive look

Fit **OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 18x8 ET45 wheels** (staggered setup: 18x8 ET45 front, 18x9 ET40 rear) with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** tires (225/40/18 front, 255/35/18 rear) and **H&R Sport Springs** (30mm drop) for improved handling and stance without sacrificing ride quality

Replace the stock headlights with **LMSpeed Carbon Fiber Projector Headlights** (LED demon eyes, sequential turn signals) and add **Morimoto XB LED fog lights** with **custom HID retrofits** (5500K) for a modern, aggressive front-end appearance
